_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Eight of the 13 OPG mice with increased BLI following PDE4A1 injection were considered to have induced cortical gliomas (Table 1). This was a statistically significant rate of induced tumor formation, as determined by Fisher's Exact Test (P=0.02).
details: 8 of 13 OPG mice developed induced cortical gliomas following PDE4A1 injection (statistically significant, P=0.02)
